title: Clarified Phase 4 Service Consolidation Status
summary: Updated Local Studio migration docs to mark Phase 4 active service consolidation as done for the current scope, identify direct local-studio launcher cleanup as planned, and clarify that the standalone audit HTTP wrapper is not needed for normal Studio or Codex workflows.
effect: The implementation plan now separates completed active Local Studio service consolidation from planned launcher and audit-wrapper cleanup. Future Codex sessions should treat `bin/local-studio` plus plain public Jekyll preview/build as the normal workflow and should not introduce new sibling HTTP services for audit behavior.
